reviews.comment:
Buen lugar. Buena atención. Precio razonables. Aceptan pago en efectivo, tarjeta de débito y crédito. Baños limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Good place. Good service. Reasonable prices. They accept cash, debit, and credit cards. Clean restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11189743280620158761/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPNzVQR0xBEAE

reviews.comment:
Exelente la atención de los empleados....
Tuvimos un inconveniente con el auto nos ayudaron en todo ....
Haata guía de turismos jaja la verdad unos genios!!!!

(Translated by Google)
The staff provided excellent service. We had car trouble and they helped us with everything. They were such great tour guides! They were truly amazing!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11189743280620158761/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPbDVDLWN3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención reciben debito y targetas ,el único lugar en san Luis con autoservicio gratuito de inflador neumaticos

(Translated by Google)
Good service, they accept debit and credit cards, the only place in San Luis with free self-service tire inflators.
